Premium outdoor saunas, built solo with uncompromising craft. Black steel, cedar heart, wood fire. Delivered within five hours of Osoyoos.

View the Builds

The Philosophy

Every build is
the only build.

Fire and Land saunas are handcrafted one at a time, solo, in Osoyoos, BC. No shortcuts. No kits. No assembly line. Each structure is built from the ground up — black corrugated steel outside, select cedar within, wood fire at the heart.

The result is a sauna that doesn't look like anything else in the market. Because it isn't.

Portfolio

The Builds

Each sauna is a commission. View our completed work below.

The Original

Black steel exterior · Cedar interior · Harvia M3 · Covered cedar porch · LED lighting · Osoyoos, BC

Build No. 2

The Starfield

8×12 · Vaulted cedar ceiling · 105 fiber optic stars · Milky Way galaxy · Off-grid battery power · Panoramic window

Build No. 2 — Featured

The
Starfield

105 fiber optic stars map the Milky Way galaxy across a vaulted cedar ceiling. Below, the Harvia M3 burns. Outside, the Okanagan horizon.

Fully off-grid. Delivered. Ready to fire.

Specifications

Built to
last.

Every detail of Build No. 2 was considered for longevity, performance, and experience.

  • 8×12 total footprint — 8×8 hot room + vestibule
  • Vaulted 1×4 select tight knot cedar ceiling, ¾" thick
  • 1×6 cedar front & back walls, ¾" thick throughout
  • Double-high integrated bench system with angled back support
  • Black corrugated steel exterior with cedar vestibule
  • Full insulation — ceiling, walls & floor with PT belly
  • Reflective vapour barrier
  • Harvia M3 wood-burning stove with 60 lbs sauna rock
  • 22"×64" double pane insulated panoramic window
  • 27"×74" tinted glass door with wood frame
  • 105 fiber optic stars — Milky Way galaxy with twinkling effect
  • East & west wall LED strip lighting
  • 3 independent lighting circuits, exterior switched
  • Milwaukee 12V 8Ah battery — completely off-grid
  • Delivered within 5 hours of Osoyoos, BC

Inside & Out

"Lie back on the upper bench. Stars above. Fire within. Mountains beyond the glass."

How It Works

The Process

Every Fire and Land sauna is a commission. Built solo, to order, without compromise.

01

Enquire

Reach out by email or phone. We'll discuss your site, your vision, and whether a Fire and Land build is the right fit.

02

Design

We work through your spec — size, layout, features. You'll know exactly what you're getting before a single board is cut.

03

Build

Your sauna is built by hand in Osoyoos. No shortcuts. Every detail finished to the same standard you see in our portfolio.

04

Deliver

We deliver within five hours of Osoyoos — included in the price. You arrange crane placement at your site. That's it.

Delivery Radius

Delivered to your property.

Delivery within five hours of Osoyoos is included in the price of every build. You arrange crane placement — we handle everything else.

Get in Touch

Ready to build?

Fire and Land takes a limited number of commissions per year. If you're serious about a build, reach out early — we'll tell you honestly whether your timeline and site are a fit.

Message received. We'll be in touch.
